title: Vectors
description: Understand 2D and 3D vectors, normalization, dot products, and cross products in gameplay coding.
learningObjectives: Visualize vectors as directions and magnitudes
Calculate dot product and interpret angle checks
Calculate cross product to resolve perpendicular vectors

sections.title: What is a Vector?
sections.content: A vector represents a quantity that has both magnitude (length) and direction. In 3D engine mathematics, vectors represent offsets, velocities, positions, and normals.

sections.title: Normalized Direction Check
